content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1549: Muster a Large Force

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

“How is it? How is it?”

Cornet was so worried. He stood by the massive Sound Stone together with many elders. When he saw Yvelines send the message, he felt his heart beat faster.

“So many members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe died here including Patriarch Chauncey. I don’t know how they will deal with this,” sighed an elder worriedly.

The Heavenly Eye Clan’s elders were restlessly anxious. They guessed that the Mysterious Sky Clan would be enraged and obliterate the entire Heavenly Eye Clan.

To the Mysterious Sky Clan, the Fiery Phoenix Tribe was more important than their Heavenly Eye Clan. They believed that the Mysterious Sky Clan would appreciate the Fiery Phoenix Tribe more than their clan.

Patriarch Chauncey represented a strong force among the forces under the Mysterious Sky Clan. Would the Mysterious Sky Clan stay idle after their expert was killed?

“We got their reply. Tu Shi Qi got the message. He had to ask for Han Tian and Judy’s direction. The two great Territory Ancestors are in the clan. We should expect bad news.” Yvelines became restless like them as he didn’t know how the Mysterious Sky Clan would react.

“Senior, will we be hunted to the last member because of this? If that happens, we will be the greatest sinners in our clan.” Masha paled. She was panic-stricken as she envisioned the worst situation.

“No, I don’t think so. It won’t happen...”

Yvelines comforted her as if he actually comforted himself.

“I hope nothing will happen. I hope Jia Ni can bring us luck. As she and Judy are sworn sisters, they should have a good relationship,” said Cornet.

Everybody waited restlessly.

After a while, the Sound Stone flashed as it received messages. Yvelines connected to the stone and his visage changed. “Go to the teleport formation! Forefather Han Tian and Judy will come to our star directly! They may take the elders of the Mysterious Sky Clan with them too!”

Hearing him, the entire Heavenly Eye Clan was horror-struck.

Han Tian and Judy were the strongest existences in this entire sea of stars. They were the most powerful experts of the Mysterious Sky Clan among the Seven Great Clan. Even the Mysterious Sky Clan members couldn’t have many chances to see them. And today, they had mustered a large force to come to the Heavenly Eye Clan for what?

At this moment, they couldn’t really think; they just moved towards the teleport formation that linked the Heavenly Eye Clan and the Mysterious Sky Clan.

Generally, every race that came to be dependent on the Mysterious Sky Clan had to sign the treaty, which regulated that they had to establish the teleport formation to the Heavenly Eye Clan. However, it was a one-way formation.

The Mysterious Sky Clan could use the formation to enter the dependent race’s territory, but the dependent race couldn’t enter the Mysterious Sky Clan’s land through that formation.

It was the gap between their position and power. In the Sea Domain of Nihility, this operation was acceptable.

Shortly after, the experts of the Heavenly Eye Clan gathered by that teleport formation to welcome Judy and Han Tian of the Mysterious Sky Clan. They watched the formation, their faces complicated and anxious. They were afraid that Han Tian and Judy would massacre their clan as soon as they arrived.

However, they understood that if Han Tian and Judy had such a plan, no matter how hard they tried, they were still going to be hunted to the last member.

The Heavenly Eye Clan didn’t have an expert strong enough to resist Judy and Han Tian. No one could battle even one of them.

They could only receive their punishment.

The teleport formation was powered by piles of divine crystals. After they had arrived for a while, a terrifying power that could tear the voice emitted from the formation.

That fierce power terrified them all. They instinctively moved away from that formation.

All of a sudden, dazzling halos radiated from the teleport formation. As the Heavenly Eye Clan warriors were dazzled, the experts walked out one after another from the formation.

Cornet tried to suppress the pain in his eyes and yelled, “Welcome Forefather Han Tian and Judy!”

“Welcome!”

“Welcome!”

The members of the Heavenly Eye Clan shouted together and showed their most humble faces with the hope of making a good impression to the others.

The halos slowly vanished and left Han Tian, Judy, and Dragon Lizard. Han Tian scanned through the entire members of the Heavenly Eye Clan and shook his head inwardly.

There was no member of the Heavenly Eye Clan that could catch his attention.

Then, he stopped at Little Ya and closed his eyes to sense for a while. “You have a good gemstone. It contains tremendous fire energy. Kid, you got lucky.”

Just like Chauncey, Han Tian also cultivated Fire power Upanishad. He had a good knowledge and keen eyes on some special treasures in fire class. The flaming crystal that Zi Yao had given away was the only thing he thought was valuable.

Except for that, the entire Heavenly Eye Clan didn’t have anything or anyone worth his attention.

A simple compliment from Han Tian made all eyes of the Heavenly Eye Clan fix on Little Ya.

That flaming crystal again?

Everybody wore strange faces. Chauncey had threatened them because of that crystal. And now, as soon as Forefather Han Tian came, the first thing he talked about was also about that crystal. How precious was it actually?

“Precursor Chauncey and the members of the Fiery Phoenix Tribe died because of that flaming crystal...”

Cornet didn’t dare to conceal anything. He explained the incident in detail. He didn’t dare to miss even the small things. He hoped that his sincerity would make Han Tian’s team show mercy.

Han Tian and the others had their eyes brighten as they listened to Cornet. Sometimes, they shot meaningful looks to Little Ya.

After a while, Han Tian grinned and said, “I think I know the reason.”

He shot Forefather Dragon Lizard a look.

Forefather Dragon Lizard nodded and said, “Her coup was successful. At this moment, she’s one of the Absolute Beginning creatures. This girlfriend of Shi Yan is much stronger than Yuan Zu that year...”

He was one of the witnesses of the battle between Zi Yao and Hui, but he didn’t know the result. And now, he knew Zi Yao had succeeded from Cornet’s information. Her soul clone had replaced the host soul and absorbed all of Hui’s memories and power.

“No wonder Chauncey died. As he messed with the one he shouldn’t have, he had to face his consequences.”

Han Tian laughed loudly as if he didn’t think Chauncey’s death mattered. Hearing him, the Heavenly Eye Clan members’ edgy nerves were relaxed.

Only Forefather Dragon Lizard understood that currently, Shi Yan and Zi Yao were much more important than Chauncey. As long as Han Tian and Judy weren’t foolish, they weren’t going to challenge Shi Yan and Zi Yao to sink in endless trouble.

Previously, when Forefather Dragon Lizard and Shi Yan met in the Sea of Annihilation and Ferrell had reported it to Judy, Judy had shown that the Mysterious Sky Clan wasn’t really concerned about Ling Mei. At that time, Judy had said that she hoped Forefather Dragon Lizard would befriend with Shi Yan.

Forefather Dragon Lizard wasn’t dumb. He knew what the Mysterious Sky Clan wanted.

“It has been a long time since I last met Jia Ni. It’s good to see her and chat for a while.” Judy smiled friendly and walked directly towards that ravine.

Finally, Yvelines and the other two could exhale in relief. As they saw Han Tian and Judy’s attitudes, they could confirm that they wouldn’t take revenge on the Heavenly Eye Clan or kill them all.

Right after that, Cornet and the members of the Heavenly Eye Clan used their most respectful manners to lead Han Tian, Judy, and the others to the gorge.

On the way, Han Tian and Judy had used their souls to discuss for a while. They came to an agreement at the end.

———————

The ravine’s entrance.

Xiao Lie of the Heavenly Craftsmen Clan and Jia Ni of the Secret Pattern Tribe were there. The two of them had the snake mark on their foreheads. They didn’t change their countenances when they saw Han Tian and Judy come personally.

Seeing the snake totem on Xiao Lie’s and Jia Ni’s foreheads, Han Tian and Judy understood the situation. They didn’t dare to act haughty. Judy smiled gently from a distance. “Jia Ni, why are you here? Oh Grandmaster Xiao Lie, you’re here too. It’s really interesting.”

“Judy, you’re getting younger. Well, I think you’ve made up your mind on this,” Jia Ni smiled at her and said, “You, Han Tian, and Dragon Lizard get in there. The others stay outside. There’s something that the juniors shouldn’t know. What do you think?”

“No problem,” Judy beamed and said, “Only I, Han Tian, and Dragon Lizard will go in. The others should stay outside. No one is allowed to say a word about things in the Heavenly Eye Clan this time.”

The members of the Mysterious Sky Clan following them here pulled stern faces as they seriously memorized what Judy said.

Right after that, as the warriors of the Mysterious Sky Clan and the Heavenly Eye Clan were dazed, Han Tian, Dragon Lizard, and Judy followed Xiao Lie, Jia Ni to the ravine.

——————————

Inside the ravine, Shi Yan, who had his eyes closed for a long time, opened his eyes and got up with a faint smile. “Greetings, precursor Han Tian and precursor Judy. I have something that I want to tell you. That’s why I asked you to come here. Please don’t mind that.”

“I used to talk to your teacher. He had stayed in the Sea Domain of Nihility for a while before returning to Desolate Territory. I couldn’t believe that he was gone. However, he raised a formidable apprentice like you. Yeah, he’s worthy of his reputation as Bloodthirsty,” Han Tian guffawed and said straightforwardly, “You shouldn’t mind my good-for-nothing junior Ling Mei. I hope it won’t be a knot between us.”

“It won’t,” Shi Yan shook his head calmly, “It has been a long time.”

“Oh, how about this lady?” Judy observed Zi Yao. Hesitating for a while, she spoke with a junior etiquette, “It’s our honor to meet the expert of the previous generation. I’m really glad.”

Zi Yao smiled and gave her a slight nod. “You, little girl, do know how to talk sweetly.”

“I know you’re very interested in the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. I won’t fish in troubled waters. Yeah, if you gather enough energy or materials, I can help you refine an Original Symbol.” Shi Yan was frank and direct. “Of course, I won’t do it for free. I will ask you to help me with something.”

When he mentioned the Original Symbol. Han Tian and Forefather Dragon Lizard’s eyes brightened.

They all looked eager and waited for Shi Yan to state his conditions. Forefather Dragon Lizard said directly, “Even without the Original Symbol, I’m always willing to help you. If it wasn’t for you, I would have died in Wavy River territory.”

Then, he shot Zi Yao a fearful look.

“You know it’s not me. You don’t have to be afraid of me anymore,” smiled Zi Yao.

Dragon Lizard nodded, “I understand. However, it’s carved deep in my mind. When I see you, I haven’t gotten used to it yet.”
